name: Whimsical MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server enabling AI agents to create and manage Whimsical diagrams — flowcharts, mind maps, wireframes, and sticky notes. Whimsical is a popular visual collaboration tool used for brainstorming, system design, and UX planning. Enables agents to programmatically create Whimsical boards from text descriptions, structured data, or agent-analyzed workflows.
use_cases: Creating flowcharts from process descriptions from documentation agents
Generating mind maps from brainstorming sessions from ideation agents
Producing wireframes from UX requirements from design assistance agents
Visualizing system architecture from system design agents
not_for: Teams using Miro, Figma, or Lucidchart for visual collaboration
Technical UML/architecture diagrams requiring strict notation (use draw.io or PlantUML)
best_when: A team using Whimsical for visual collaboration wants AI agents to programmatically create diagrams — generating flowcharts and mind maps from text descriptions or structured data.
avoid_when: You don't use Whimsical. Alternative diagramming tools (Miro, Lucidchart, draw.io) have their own MCPs with similar functionality.

auth.notes: Whimsical API token required. Get from Whimsical account settings. Community MCP — not officially from Whimsical.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Whimsical free tier: limited boards; paid plans for unlimited
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Whimsical account required. Free tier may limit board creation.

known_agent_gotchas: Whimsical API is not officially documented for public use — may change without warning
Community MCP using unofficial API — check Whimsical ToS for automation use
Diagram complexity is limited by Whimsical's rendering capabilities
Board content is stored in Whimsical's cloud — consider data privacy for sensitive diagrams
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API token auth. Diagram content stored in Whimsical cloud. Don't create diagrams with sensitive business data in environments where cloud storage is restricted.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cloud storage in Whimsical servers. API token required. Diagram content may include business information — review data residency requirements.
